## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `npm run build` locally and it succeeded
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Updated docs / sidebar (`astro.config.mjs`) if a docs page was added
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or generated `dist/` files committed
- [ ] If this changes the homepage or releases data, verified the Cloudflare
      Pages preview deploy renders correctly
